name: TOEFL Writing for an Academic Discussion

criteria.name: Relevance & Contribution
criteria.description: Directly addresses the professor's question and adds a clear, well-supported opinion to the discussion.

criteria.name: Elaboration
criteria.description: Reasons and examples are specific and fully explained, not just stated.

criteria.name: Coherence
criteria.description: Ideas connect logically; clear progression with effective transitions.

criteria.name: Language Use
criteria.description: Range and accuracy of grammar and vocabulary; idiomatic, varied sentence structure.

instructions: This is a ~10-minute task; a strong response is roughly 100-160 words. Reward a clear stance engaging with the two student posts. Penalize off-topic content, vague generalities, and repeated errors that impede meaning.
